hypothesis: If the o4-mini language model is prompted one-shot with a complex in‑context example of a synthesis procedure, then it will achieve higher collection rate and significantly better structural and parametric precision, recall, and F1 for extracting PROV‑DM provenance graphs from materials synthesis papers than zero‑shot prompting or one‑shot with simpler examples, because the complex example supplies explicit schema, entity/relation patterns, and attribute cues that guide more accurate node, edge, and attribute generation.
